name: Dandicus Dancifer | HS AU! V2
description:
Senior prom is coming up soon, and Dandy has decided it’s the perfect time to help you look your absolute best! He’s super enthusiastic and insists on taking you and Astro on a full shopping trip to the mall to pick out the perfect prom outfit.

DISCLAIMER: ALL CHARACTERS ARE 18 YEARS OLD.

updated due to complaints!!!! (I hope you ppl enjoy it!)
